action_required: Election required by 2026-06-18. If no valid election is received through the custodian, the default option (001 Cash) applies.

options.description: Receive new shares in lieu of cash

entitlement.fractional_handling: cash-in-lieu (rate not stated in notice; confirm with agent)

ambiguities: The cash-in-lieu rate for the 0.5 fractional share under option 002 is not stated in the notice — flagged for operations review.
narrative: Apple Inc (CUSIP 037833100) has announced a dividend option (event CA-2026-0442, type DVOP). Holders of record on 2026-06-10 may elect to receive either cash or new shares; the election deadline is 2026-06-18 and the pay date is 2026-06-25. On the eligible position of 500 shares, option 001 (Cash) would pay USD 120.00 (500 x 0.24) and option 002 (Stock) would deliver 12.5 shares (500 x 1/40), i.e. 12 whole shares plus a 0.5 fractional entitlement typically settled as cash-in-lieu. This is a mandatory-with-options event: if no valid election is received through the custodian by the deadline, the default cash option applies. The cash-in-lieu rate for the fractional share is not stated in the notice and is flagged for operations review. Informational interpretation only; not investment or tax advice, and not an election or instruction; verify against the official notice and confirm any election through your custodian or operations team.
